reason: Global TianChen-RV authority chain, RVV Stage 2 selected-body realization, and anti-metadata-authority invariants.
RVV plugin-local selected-body realization and resource-aware Stage 2 rules.
Common EmitC neutrality and provider-built route contract.
Resource-aware selected-body realization must be real structure, not artifact-only evidence.
Focused lit/FileCheck and RVV evidence expectations.
Ensure performance config is consumed into realized body structure.
Previous resource-fact foundation and continuation point.
Low-precision resource fact names and constants.
Provider route-family resource validation and plan derivation.
Selected-body route slice collection currently enforces one setvl/with_vl and may need bounded multi-region support.
Focused positive/fail-closed lit coverage for this route.

summary: Added RVV plugin-local tcrv_rvv.vsetvl_region_marker op/verifier as structural schedule evidence for Gearbox vsetvl placement; it consumes the active !tcrv_rvv.vl token and is deliberately not a common EmitC role op or route authority.

Updated low-precision product-reduction-dequantization selected-body realization to emit two ordered placement markers: load-product-reduce and dequant-store, both tied to the selected RVV low-precision resource decision.

Updated RVV route slice planning to collect marker ops, exclude them from construction role-order validation, and permit them only for the bounded widening_product_reduce_dequantize_f32 selected-body route.
Updated contraction provider planning to fail closed when realized marker count, phase, index/count, resource decision, or bound with_vl token disagrees with RVV-owned resource facts.
Updated focused pre-realized and explicit product-reduction-dequantization artifact tests; explicit fixture now represents an already-realized body with resource facts and marker structure.

Updated .trellis/spec/extension-plugins/rvv-plugin.md to record that low-precision Gearbox vsetvl placement/resource facts must be consumed into provider-verifiable realized structure and mismatch must fail closed.
